title: Tunisian Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired stew made with chicken, vegetables, and spices. Perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add onions and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add carrots, potatoes, cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add Tunisian spice blend and stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water to the tagine and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30-40 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with crispy onions and fresh parsley.
